concerns: Claims reported in 3 of 5 policy years (2020, 2022, 2024), representing a 60% claim-frequency rate

risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: 5-year prior insurance history (2020–2024) reflects 3 claim occurrences across 5 policy periods: 1 claim each in 2020 (Berkshire Hathaway Guard), 2022 (AIG), and 2024 (CNA Financial); claim-free years in 2021 (Auto-Owners) and 2023 (Zurich). No cancellations or non-renewals reported in any year. Loss ratios were not provided. Annual premiums ranged from $414,601.77 to $470,199.50, with a general declining trend from 2021 onward. Total 5-year premium spend: $2,223,605.68.
